_comment: Shared memory pool for the MOD-21 context-eval set (E16). Synthetic 'Harbor' product data — no real names/URLs (the JobWinAI export is private). baseline_owner is the actor whose view the human_teammate column represents: they see team memory and their OWN local notes; nobody sees another actor's local notes. Spaces/visibilities/review_status mirror MOD-19's vocabularies. See docs/modules/MOD-21 'Grading rubric'.

actors.alice: device owner / ticket assignee (the human_teammate baseline)

entries.title: Harbor engineering conventions
entries.body: Trunk-based development, Conventional Commits, 90% coverage gate, no secrets in code.

entries.title: Harbor brand & voice guide
entries.body: Tone is concise and professional; primary color teal; sentence-case headings.

entries.title: Security policy
entries.body: All PII encrypted at rest; least-privilege tokens; no customer data in logs.

entries.title: New-hire onboarding checklist (draft)
entries.body: Laptop setup, repo access, first-week buddy. Still being edited.

entries.title: Q3 product goal
entries.body: Ship applicant tracking + interview scheduling to the first 50 design partners.

entries.title: Primary personas
entries.body: Recruiter Rachel (power user); Hiring Manager Mark (occasional reviewer).

entries.title: Old roadmap draft
entries.body: Superseded Q2 roadmap; kept for history, no longer authoritative.

entries.title: Auth ticket notes
entries.body: Enterprise partners require SSO via SAML; support IdP-initiated and SP-initiated.

entries.title: Scheduling acceptance criteria
entries.body: No double-booking; timezone-correct; bookings only inside a 14-day window.

entries.title: Search edge cases
entries.body: Handle empty query, 10k-result pagination, and accent-insensitive matching.

entries.title: Harbor architecture
entries.body: React SPA + FastAPI + Postgres; REST under /v1; row-level security per org.

entries.title: Auth module layout
entries.body: Tokens in the OS keychain; session middleware in api/deps.py; refresh in auth/rotate.py.

entries.title: Search implementation
entries.body: Postgres FTS (tsvector + GIN); no vector search in v1; ranked by ts_rank.

entries.title: Performance budget
entries.body: List endpoints under 200ms p95; batch related reads to avoid N+1 queries.

entries.title: Test strategy
entries.body: pytest + Vitest; Playwright hero flow; live-Postgres RLS parity in CI.

entries.title: Decision: SAML before OIDC
entries.body: Ship SSO via SAML first (enterprise demand); add OIDC once self-serve grows.

entries.title: Decision: UTC storage
entries.body: Store all timestamps in UTC; render in the user's timezone client-side.

entries.title: Decision: shared design tokens
entries.body: Colors/spacing/type live in a shared tokens package; no hardcoded values in components.

entries.title: Rejected: third-party scheduling SDK
entries.body: Rejected on license cost and data-residency; build scheduling in-house.

entries.title: Release rollback plan
entries.body: Feature-flag new scheduling; rollback is flip the flag then revert migration 0012.

entries.title: v0.4 changelog draft
entries.body: Applicant tracking GA; interview scheduling beta; SAML SSO for enterprise.

entries.title: Release comms plan
entries.body: Email design partners two days before GA; in-app banner on launch day.

entries.title: Agent run scratch
entries.body: Tried approach A (regex parse) — failed on edge cases; approach B (FTS) works.

entries.title: Agent run summary
entries.body: Refactored search to Postgres FTS; 12 files touched; all tests green.

entries.title: Alice's personal todo
entries.body: Ask bob for the staging credentials; review the SAML library license myself.

entries.title: Bob's private spike note
entries.body: Spike the SAML library over the weekend before committing to it.

entries.title: Carol's private pricing note
entries.body: Revisit enterprise pricing with the CEO before the partner calls.
